title: Smoky Crumbly Berry Creme Brulee Crumble
description: A romantic and smoky British dessert featuring frozen mixed berries with a crumbly creme brûlée base that pairs perfectly with a low-carb-friendly topping.
instructions: Prepare the berry compote by gently heating the frozen berries in a saucepan with 1/4 cup of water for about 5 minutes until they soften.
In a small bowl, mix together the heavy cream and condensed milk. Set aside.
Mix ground almonds into the sweetened cream mixture if using.
Pour the compote evenly over each serving dish. Spoon the crème brûlée mixture on top and smooth with a spatula.
Sprinkle granulated sugar generously over the creme brûlée base.
Bake in oven until golden brown, about 10-15 minutes. Remove from heat and cool completely before topping with blue cheese.
